flow.error_timeout: Radio did not reach playing state within 10 seconds

manual_add.title: Add radio manually
manual_add.hint: Enter the IP address and PIN code of the radio.
manual_add.error: Could not connect to the radio. Check the IP address and PIN code.
manual_add.ip_note: Tip: assign a fixed IP address to your radio in your router settings to prevent connection issues after a restart.
